description: Slow, evenly-paced delivery with extended pauses between sentences to support auditory processing. Low compression ensures words are not rushed or blended. Emphasis on key terms aids word-level recognition. No rapid cadence shifts. Designed for users with dyslexia who benefit from steady, unhurried vocal pacing with clear word boundaries.
intended_use: Users with dyslexia who process information through auditory channels
Read-aloud systems where pacing supports word recognition
Educational voice interfaces requiring deliberate delivery
Environments where steady rhythm reduces cognitive load
